title: Extraordinarily Optimized (EO)
description: An optimization modpack that phenomenally boosts your FPS. Fabric 1.21.8, 26.1.2 coming soon.
body:
![EO's render. BG - Pinterest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2b689dca16d7e3892f72fd877d526025fddfebb_0.webp)
##  This is Extraordinarily Optimized.
Extraordinarily Optimized is a modpack that aims to **significantly** double, or triple your FPS. The modpack revolutionizes around many miscellaneous and major tweaks to alleviate the stress on your GPU and CPU rendering. EO is built with the focus of performance and optimizations, meaning **it has slight to no QoL (quality of life) additions.** If you want to, feel free to add any extra mods you like.
<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>
  
## Mods include:

- [AntiGhost FORK](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost-fork) by [IkyMax](https://modrinth.com/user/IkyMax) (Gets rid of ghost blocks by requesting resends from the server)
  
- [Anvian's Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/anvians-lib) by [anvian](https://modrinth.com/user/anvian) (Dependency for Sodium Extra Information)

- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) by [MaxNeedsSnacks](https://modrinth.com/user/MaxNeedsSnacks)  (Dependency for many mods in this pack)

- [Argonyte](https://modrinth.com/mod/argonyte) by [FanofModding](https://modrinth.com/user/FanofModding) (for tracking FPS; optional mod)

- [ASYNC](https://modrinth.com/mod/async) by [AxalotLDev](https://modrinth.com/user/AxalotLDev) (Processes mobs in parallel threads, improving performance)

- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) by [thosea](https://modrinth.com/user/thosea) (Miscellaneous optimizations other than just the basic ones)

- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen) (Enhances the visuality of beds and changes the renderer of the bed to use json models instead of block entities)

- [Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3) by [tyrannus](https://modrinth.com/user/tyrannus) (QoL; makes the F3 screen less incohesive)

- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel) (Dependency for many mods in this pack)

- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) (Improvises on chunk and world gen, I/O, and loading)

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by [PepperCode1](https://modrinth.com/user/PepperCode1) (Connects block textures together, i.e. glass)

- [Cubes without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) by [Kira-NT](https://modrinth.com/user/Kira-NT) (QoL; makes Minecraft borderless fullscreen when F11 is prompted)

- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen) (Culls leaves to make the vanilla experience faster)

- [Culler](https://modrinth.com/mod/culler) by [iMeeTake](https://modrinth.com/user/iMeeTake) (Culls distant entities and block entities (DELETE THIS IF IT CAUSES PROBLEMS))

- [Client Side Noteblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsidenoteblocks) by [DaCubeKing](https://modrinth.com/user/DaCubeKing) (Removes the redundant lag while playing a noteblock)

- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander) (Fixes bugs found in the Minecraft Bug Tracker)

- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames) (Reduces block entity FPS lag by using baked block models)

- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) (Culls entities behind walls)

- [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) (Reduces the speed of GUI and framerate render to render the world faster)

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50) (Lightweight modular API providing common hooks and various intercompatibility measured to be used my mods, using the Fabric toolchain)

- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50) (Usage of the Kotlin programming language, used by Fabric mods)

- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811) (Reduces memory usage efficiently)

- [FIX MY PINGGGGG](https://modrinth.com/mod/pingfix) by [Itamio](https://modrinth.com/user/Itamio) (Makes sure such that you have a internet connection, you can ping the server and can connect to it)

- [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer) by [bre2el](https://modrinth.com/user/bre2el) (Reduces GPU and CPU load after no user operation exists)

- [GPUBooster](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape) by [Mr. Toad](https://modrinth.com/user/Mr.Toad) (Facilitates rendering using OpenGL v4.0+)

- [Idle Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/idletweaks) by [Armandukx](https://modrinth.com/user/Armandukx) (Reduces Minecraft's resource usage when tabbed out)

- [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC) (Speeds up immediate mode rendering)

- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) (A modern shaderpack loader made to be compatible with current OptiFine shaders)

- [Ixeris](https://modrinth.com/mod/ixeris) by [decce6](https://modrinth.com/user/decce6) (Polls events in spare threads)

- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) by [astei](https://modrinth.com/user/astei) (Optimizes the Minecraft networking stack)

- [Krypton FNP Patcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/kryptonfnp-patcher) by [4x](https://modrinth.com/user/4x) (Optimizes the network and adds more support to Krypton (DELETE IF IT CAUSES PROBLEMS))

- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) by [Jerozgen](https://modrinth.com/user/Jerozgen) (Adds language fallbacks and reduces loading times)

- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) (Optimizes game logic, i.e. block ticing, entities, AI, etc)

- [Load Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/loadsupport) by [vaporvee](https://modrinth.com/user/vaporvee) (Warns the user if the allocated memory is too low, and makes a sound upon finishing loading)

- [Midnight Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen) (Dependency for Cull Leaves and Better Beds)

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector) (Adds a list to see what mods you have - mods that support ModMenu are only shown in the list)

- [ModelFixGaps](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) by [MehVaadJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar) (Fixes the gaps in block/item models)

- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt) (Improvises on performance, memory usage, and bug-fixing)

- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) by [FX](https://modrinth.com/user/FX) (Changes how various types of culling are carried out, enhancing performance)

- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) by [Aizistral](https://modrinth.com/user/Aizistral) (Disables chat reporting on your end by stripping the cryptographic signatures in each text message sent from 1.19+)

- [Not So Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/notsoessential) by [Scherso](https://modrinth.com/user/Scherso) (A "fix" of the Essential mod, stripping it off of its social and QoL counterparts to combine performance and utility)

- [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) by [Aeltumn](https://modrinth.com/user/Aeltumn) (Improvises play on multiplayer servers, fixing QoL bugs and adds new QoL)

- [OWO Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) by [glisco](https://modrinth.com/user/glisco) (Dependency used by some mods in this modpack)

- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/mpalladium) by [Mr. Toad](https://modrinth.com/user/Mr.Toad) (An optimization mod adding deduplication, improves memory usage, nbt, shaders, and whatnot)

- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese) (Adds more info to Sodium, which usually arent supposed to be there)

- [Resource Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-config-api) by [xStopho](https://modrinth.com/user/xStopho) (A config API; dependency for some mods in this pack)

- [ResourcePackCached](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcepackcached) by [Furq](https://modrinth.com/user/Furq) (Keeps your resource packs cached even after leaving a server, ready to load in anytime you join one)

- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) by [DeDiamondPro](https://modrinth.com/user/DeDiamondPro) (In-game resource pack, data pack, and shader browser and installer)

- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) (Starlight fork; improvises on the performance of light updating in Minecraft)

- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax) (A proximity voice chat to negate the need of third party communication apps, such as Discord; greatly boosting memory)

- [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) by [SmajloSlovakian](https://modrinth.com/user/SmajloSlovakian) (QoL; allows hotbars and lists to be scrolled smoothly)

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) (Top-of-the-line optimization mod concerning OpenGL related issues. I'm pretty sure you have this in your mods.)

- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese) (Adds more info in Sodium that... shoudln't be there)

- [Sodium Extra Inofrmation](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra-information) by [anvian](https://modrinth.com/user/anvian) (Even more info in Sodium cause why not?)

- [Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni) (An unofficial port of LambDynLights, adding a Sodium options integration)

- [Sodium Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extras) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni) (even MORE extras because why NOT???)

- [Sodium Options API](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-options-api) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni) (The API for all these "extra info" mods made by Txni)

- [Sodium Options Mod Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-options-mod-compat) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni) (Adds compatibility for various mods using the aforementioned Sodium Options API)

- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax) (QoL; Completely rehauls sound amplification, reverberation, and absorption via blocks)

- [Super Fast Math](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-fast-math) by [justElias](https://modrinth.com/user/justElias) (Hands the java FastMath a lookup table, making trig calculations faster)

- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox) (A text API, also a dependency for many mods in this pack)

- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) by [getchoo](https://modrinth.com/user/getchoo) (Smooth Boot >1.20 Fork; Improves and tweaks Minecraft thread scheduling)

- [ThreatenGL](https://modrinth.com/mod/threatengl) by [Richy-Z](https://modrinth.com/user/Richy-Z) ("Threatens" Minecraft to use modern versions of OpenGL v4.0+ (CHECK THE DESCRIPTION OF THE MOD FOR INFO))

- [TLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/tlib) by [iMeeTake](https://modrinth.com/user/iMeeTake) (Dependency for iMeetake's mods)

- [ToadLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/toadlib) by [Mr. Toad](https://modrinth.com/user/Mr.Toad) (Dependency for Palladium and GPUBooster)

- [Too Many Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/too-many-entities) by [Discusser](https://modrinth.com/user/Discusser) (Hides extra entities to reduce lag; kind of like splashing an invis pot on them except the time is longer now)

- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) (Improvises server performance when playing on servers with large playercounts)

- [Yet Another Config Lib YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander) (Dependency for many mods in this pack)

- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander) (QoL; a zooming mod, kind of like OptiFine's)

The modpack said "phenomenally increases your FPS," so you can't really counter this.  I'm doing what I prospected to do lol

Credits to [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) for the 'Included Mods' list idea.

If any problems arise, kindly check the dropdown below this one:
</details>
<details>
<summary>Important</summary>
  
I am **NOT** a modder, I am just another ordinary player who plays Minecraft to _live the glory days._ If and unless anything goes wrong, or you have some complications, my Discord is **cloud3d_.spxctre** (an issue tracker will be opened soon).
  
  More to note: **This is a project I made for fun to test out Modrinth's projectmaking. It is very unlikely I will maintain this mod for long; do not be surprised if I don't.** Lastly, I'd like to credit other inspirational modpacks, such as Remarkably Optimized, Simply Optimized, etc. as they are the reason why I made this.
</details>
